movies.title: Moonlit Heist
movies.synopsis: A pair of art thieves race through a museum gala while every suspect seems to be filming them.

movies.title: Jungle Pals
movies.synopsis: A troop of rainforest animals turn a lost-map rescue into a noisy all-ages expedition.

movies.title: Summer on Harbor Street
movies.synopsis: Four neighbors spend one humid weekend trying to save their favorite corner diner from closing.

movies.title: Magic Treehouse
movies.synopsis: A pair of siblings discover that every page in a library treehouse opens a real doorway.
